title: Compensation of special counsel
doc_html:
§23.  Compensation of special counsel

The board of liquidation of the state debt may borrow the funds necessary to meet the compensation of the special counsel employed under R.S. 49:21.
doc_text:
§23.  Compensation of special counsel
The board of liquidation of the state debt may borrow the funds necessary to meet the compensation of the special counsel employed under R.S. 49:21.
